description: Canonical Violyra production phase definitions. Consumed by writing-video-plan, executing-video-plan, and docs/usage.md. Do not duplicate phase names or artifact paths in other skill files — reference this file instead.

phases.title: Set up project workspace
verification: project.json exists and is valid JSON
assets/ and logs/ directories exist

phases.title: Localize source audio and lyrics
verification: aligned_lyrics.json exists
line count in aligned_lyrics.json matches sung-line count in lyrics.txt

phases.title: Run production pipeline (chapter, shot-list, shot-details, packs)
verification: chapter.json exists and has at least one chapter
shot-list.json exists and scene count matches storyboard
shot-details.json exists
packs/ directory contains at least one pack file

phases.title: Verify lyric-to-scene alignment
verification: aligned_lyrics.json line count matches shot-list scene count or discrepancy is documented in project.json
phases.note: Run when shot count and lyric line count diverge. Documents the reconciliation decision in project.json.

phases.title: Generate reference images and start frames
verification: reference-frames/ directory exists and contains at least one image per named character
actor packs include reference_image paths
phases.note: Required when a character appears in 3 or more scenes. Skip only for single-appearance or abstract visual content.

phases.title: Write video generation prompts
verification: video-prompts.json exists
prompt count matches scene count in shot-details.json

phases.title: First-pass scene generation
verification: scenes/ directory exists
clip count in scenes/ matches scene count in video-prompts.json
each clip is readable video (non-zero file size)

phases.title: Compile draft video
verification: output/draft.mp4 exists and is non-zero
video duration is within 10% of song.mp3 duration

phases.title: Retention-driven development pass
verification: retention-report.json exists
all scenes scoring below threshold have been replaced or documented as accepted

phases.title: Recompile after retention pass
verification: output/final.mp4 exists and is non-zero
final.mp4 is newer than draft.mp4

phases.title: Request video review
verification: review-feedback.md exists
review-feedback.md contains an explicit pass or fail decision

phases.title: Generate thumbnail
verification: output/thumbnail.jpg exists and is non-zero
image dimensions are at least 1280x720

phases.title: Delivery
verification: final.mp4 and thumbnail.jpg are present in output/
review-feedback.md shows a pass decision
phases.note: No skill for this phase — delivery is platform-specific. The agent or user uploads the files.
